name: KOReader
author: Hans-Werner
install: OTA_SERVER="https://ota.koreader.rocks/" CHANNEL="nightly" OTA_ZSYNC="koreader-kindlehf-latest-$CHANNEL.zsync"; [ -f /lib/ld-linux-armhf.so.3 ] && OTA_ZSYNC="koreader-kindlehf-latest-$CHANNEL.zsync" || OTA_ZSYNC="koreader-kindlepw2-latest-$CHANNEL.zsync"; OTA_FILENAME=$(curl "$OTA_SERVER$OTA_ZSYNC" -s -r 0-150 | grep Filename | sed 's/Filename: //'); [ -z "$OTA_FILENAME" ] && { sleep 5; exit; }; curl "$OTA_SERVER$OTA_FILENAME" -s --output /tmp/KoreaderInstall.tar.gz && tar -xf /tmp/KoreaderInstall.tar.gz -C /mnt/us/ && sleep 5
